## Summary
<!-- Briefly describe the issue, request, or work needed. -->

## Problem or goal
<!-- Explain what is wrong, missing, confusing, or worth improving. -->

## Expected outcome
<!-- Describe what should happen when this issue is resolved. -->

## Current behavior or context
<!-- For bugs, describe what happens now. For requests, describe the current limitation or background. -->

## Steps to reproduce
<!-- If this is a bug, list clear steps. If this is not a bug, write "Not applicable". -->

1. 
2. 
3. 

## Proposed solution or notes
<!-- Share any ideas, constraints, links, screenshots, logs, examples, or implementation notes that may help. -->

## Impact
<!-- Describe who is affected and how important this is. Include urgency, risk, or priority if known. -->

## Environment
<!-- If relevant, include OS, browser, app version, package version, commit, or deployment environment. Otherwise write "Not applicable". -->

## Checklist
- [ ] I searched existing issues before opening this one.
- [ ] I included enough context for someone else to understand the request.
- [ ] I added reproduction steps, examples, logs, or screenshots where relevant.
